# SonoPrep

> SonoPrep is an ARDMS SPI exam prep platform for sonography students and working sonographers. It provides a question bank, flashcard system, physics study notes, and domain-specific practice tools built around the official ARDMS content outline.

## What SonoPrep Is

SonoPrep helps candidates pass the ARDMS Sonography Principles and Instrumentation (SPI) exam — the mandatory prerequisite for all ARDMS specialty credentials: RDMS, RDCS, RVT, and RMSKS.

The SPI exam covers 5 domains: ultrasound physics, transducer technology and management, image optimization, Doppler principles, and clinical safety. Doppler (34%) and image optimization (26%) together make up 60% of the exam.

SonoPrep is not a generic test-prep site. Every product — questions, flashcards, and study notes — is mapped to the official ARDMS SPI content outline and weighted by how heavily each domain appears on the exam.

## Products

### Physics Pearls ($9)
50 concise summaries of the most commonly tested ultrasound physics concepts. Formulas, definitions, and relationships the ARDMS actually tests. Instant digital download.

### Flashcards ($24)
200+ digital flashcards organized by SPI domain. Spaced-repetition friendly. Covers all five ARDMS SPI content areas. Works on mobile and desktop.

### Study Notes ($34)
159-page PDF study guide. Written to the ARDMS content outline. Covers all five domains: physics principles, artifact identification, Doppler analysis, transducer types, quality assurance, and bioeffects. Printable.

### Exam Simulator ($49.99)
170+ practice questions in ARDMS-style multiple-choice format. Timed exam mode, immediate answer explanations, domain-level performance tracking.

### Full Bundle ($99)
All four products. 90-day access. 14-day money-back guarantee.

## Target Audience

- Sonography students in ARDMS-accredited programs (RDMS, RDCS, RVT, RMSKS tracks)
- Repeat SPI candidates who failed on a previous attempt
- Working sonographers refreshing physics knowledge before re-certification
- Candidates with strong clinical skills but weaker physics background

## Key Facts

- 6 core SPI domains covered (all five ARDMS + Doppler subdivisions)
- 200+ flashcards, 170+ exam questions, 50 Physics Pearls, 159-page notes
- 90-day access on all digital products
- 14-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked
- Built by an RDMS instructor at Houston International Cardiotech Ultrasound School
- No subscription — one-time purchase

## About the SPI Exam

- 110 multiple-choice questions, approximately 90 scored
- 2.5-hour time limit
- Passing score: approximately 555/700 (scaled)
- Administered at Pearson VUE testing centers and via online proctoring
- Required for: RDMS, RDCS, RVT, RMSKS, and all other ARDMS specialty credentials
